description: A dev-channel (unsigned, side-loaded) pack declares pack_id waiveo/settings -- a reserved first-party namespace -- attempting to shadow a real first-party pack under developer mode. Refused: a dev-channel identity's own pack_id publisher segment must itself be the reserved dev publisher or a local- prefixed name, never a registered or reserved third-party/first-party namespace, regardless of developer mode being enabled.

error.reason: reserved first-party namespace, not the dev publisher or a local- prefix
